name: web_search
description: Search the web using Naver (default), Google, Brave, Gemini, Grok, Kimi, or Perplexity. Returns top search results with titles, snippets, and URLs. Daily usage is rate-limited.

engine.description: Search engine to use. Default is naver. Options: naver, google, brave, gemini, grok, kimi, perplexity.
